abilities.name: Caught It!
abilities.text: When another ally within 6" discards an Improvised Enhancement upgrade, this model may attach that upgrade.

abilities.name: Demise (Expendable)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, either draw a card or make a Scheme marker in base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Three Kids in a Ghillie Suit

actions.name: Slung-shot
actions.effects: An ally within 3" of the target may gain an Impact token.

triggers.name: Rickity-shay
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker within 3" of the target.

actions.name: Got Your Parts
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Discard an Improvised Enhancement upgrade from this model. The target attaches the discarded upgrade. Then, move this model up to 3".

triggers.name: Oooh! More Parts!
triggers.text: Attach an Improvised Enhancement upgrade to this model.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.
